raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 252 aims to alleviate the impacts of the Sustainable Groundwater Management Act on farmers.",
    "The bill will create a pilot program to repurpose formerly irrigated agricultural land for groundwater recharge, biodiversity conservation, and pollinator habitat.",
    "The Sustainable Groundwater Management Act requires local Groundwater Sustainability Agencies to manage groundwater usage to protect local basins.",
    "Significant amounts of farmland will need to be taken out of production to reduce water demand and protect groundwater basins.",
    "The land repurposing program proposed in AB 252 aims to minimize disruptions to California's agricultural economy.",
    "The program can reduce negative impacts of taking land out of production, such as invasive weeds and dust emissions.",
    "AB 252 intends to bring substantial benefits to rural communities and wildlife habitats."
  ]
}
```
